hero_subtext_1: If you're over 40 and noticing low energy, reduced drive, or feeling like you've lost your edge — you're not alone. And you certainly don't have to accept it.

benefits_headline: Why Most Blokes Over 40 Feel Like a Shadow of Themselves
benefits_paragraphs: After 40, your body's natural testosterone production starts declining — often by 1-2% per year. By 50, you could have 10-20% less than at 25. The effects go well beyond the bedroom.
Low energy. Brain fog. Weight gain round the middle. Reduced muscle mass. Weakened drive. Feeling like you're just going through the motions.
VapoFil changes this. Our formula combines 6 clinically studied ingredients that target the root cause — not just masking symptoms, but restoring your body's natural vitality.
urgency_text: 65% off today — but stock is limited. Don't wait.

science_steps.text: Tongkat Ali and Boron release testosterone from SHBG. More free testosterone = more energy and drive.
Horny Goat Weed boosts nitric oxide production, improving circulation throughout your body.
Sarsaparilla and Nettle Leaf regulate hormones naturally — no crash, no stimulants.

faq_items.question: Will this actually work for me?
faq_items.answer: The ingredients have been extensively studied for male vitality. Thousands of men over 40 report real results. Give it 3-4 weeks of consistent daily use.

faq_items.question: Is it safe?
faq_items.answer: 100% natural, stimulant-free, made in an FDA-registered, GMP-certified facility. No harsh side effects. Consult your GP if you take medications.

faq_items.question: How do I take it?
faq_items.answer: 2 capsules each morning with water. Most men notice energy improvements within the first week.

faq_items.question: What if it doesn't work?
faq_items.answer: 60-day money-back guarantee. Full refund, no questions asked.

faq_items.question: Is this a subscription?
faq_items.answer: No. One-off purchase. No hidden charges or auto-shipments.

faq_items.question: Why is the 6-bottle kit most popular?
faq_items.answer: Real results take 90 days of consistent use. The 6-bottle kit gives you 3 months at the best price — 65% off with free UK shipping.
